Your Edson Dentists

We offer a full range of dental services including Invisalign®, Wisdom Tooth Extractions, IV sedation dentistry and More.
All services provided by a general dentist.

DR. ARAVIND SANGARAPPILLAI

Dr. Aravind has practiced dentistry in Edson for years with a passion for superior patient care. He is devoted to treating his patients with respect, courtesy, compassion and dignity while providing the best dental care possible. Over the years he has earned the trust of patients of all ages. Community involvement has been important from day one and continues to be a priority for Dr. Aravind.

Book AN Appointment

About Yellowhead Dental​

Yellowhead Dental Centre has been serving the Edson Community for over 30 years. Some of the names and faces have changed but our core values have not. Your comfort and confidence are always our priority in our clinic. Our team of healthcare professionals are dedicated to providing dental care tailored to the needs of our patients. 

We strive to deliver the best dental treatment available using up-to-date techniques and materials. While we offer a wide range of restorative and surgical procedures we emphasize and encourage good oral hygiene and preventive maintenance for all of our patients.

More About Us

Free Consultations

If you're in need of Dental Implants or Invisalign, we offer Complimentary Consultations to help you decide what is best for you

Direct Billing

We offer direct billing to most insurance providers, as well as offering payment plans to those who may require it

Accepting New Patients

Yellowhead Dental Clinic is always accepting new patients, from individuals to your whole family. Call and book with us today

Convenient Hours

Our clinic is open Monday to Friday until, allowing you time to get in and see your dentist after work.

Friendly Team

Our dental team always goes above and beyond for our patients in a welcoming environment.

Our Services

Yellowhead Dental offers a full range of services and cosmetic dentistry. All services performed by a general dentist

QUICK AND RELIABLE DENTAL CARE WHEN YOU NEED IT

At Yellowhead Dental Centre, we provide reliable dental care for patients of all age groups. Our friendly dental team provides professional care to keep your smile healthy and strong.

Visit us at 5013 2 Ave, Edson, AB T7E 1T7, or call 780-723-6623 to book your appointment. You can also contact us by email at yellowhead@nationaldental.ca

If you are looking for a trusted dentist in Edson, Yellowhead Dental is ready to help. Book your appointment today and take the next step toward a healthy smile.

Dr. Linsie Landa

Dr. Linsie Landa was born in a small town in Saskatchewan. Her interest in dentistry was peaked at a young age having family members in the field. She graduated at the top of her class with honours.

Dr. Landa enjoys the challenge of the dynamic field of dentistry. She continually advances her knowledge in the field with advanced education courses to keep at the forefront of new technology. She dedicates herself to patient care as the most important part of dentistry. She is excited to be a part of the Yellowhead Dental team.

What Our Patients Are Saying

See what our patients are saying! Read our reviews to find out why Edson loves our friendly staff, comfortable clinic, and fast, helpful dental care.

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I find a dentist in my area?

Look for a dental clinic that offers complete care, convenient appointments, and a welcoming environment. Reading patient appraisals can also help you choose the right dentist nearby.

What dental services do you provide?

We provide dental checkups, cleanings, emergency care, cosmetic dentistry, Invisalign®, dental implants, and family dental services for all ages.

Are new patients welcome?

Yes, we welcome new patients and families. Our team works hard to make every visit comfortable and easy from the beginning.

Can I expect to receive immediate help if I have a dental emergency?

Yes, we offer emergency dental care for tooth pain, broken teeth, swelling, and other urgent dental concerns whenever possible.

How do I set up a visit?

You can book an appointment by calling our clinic or contacting us through the website. Our team will help you choose a convenient appointment time.

Do you accept insurance in your clinic?

Yes, we take most dental insurance plans and can help you understand your coverage and claims process.
